On Stage & Beyond

EVENTS & SANGEETHS

From private sangeeth choreography to community showcases — we bring your celebration to life.

💍
SANGEETH CHOREOGRAPHY

Custom choreography for the bride, groom, family and friends — performance-ready in just a few sessions. Make your sangeeth night unforgettable with Chaitanya Master's signature filmy style.

Book Sangeeth
🎭
STAGE PERFORMANCES

Annual showcases and community events featuring our students across all age groups. Watch kids, teens and adults light up the stage with months of hard work and heart.

Learn More
🎂
PRIVATE EVENTS

Birthdays, anniversaries and cultural celebrations — bring Dansvilla energy to your special day. We tailor performances and workshops to fit your event perfectly.

Book Private Event
Meet Your Instructor

CHAITANYA
MASTER

2011
Journey Began
200+
Ottawa Students
50+
Performances
2026
Studio Opened

Born from the heartbeat of Hyderabad and now setting Ottawa's dance floor on fire — I'm a choreographer, performer, and entertainer who transforms dance classes into cinematic experiences. ✨

My journey started in Hyderabad in 2011 with one passion — making people fall in love with dance. Since then, I've trained thousands of students, choreographed hundreds of stage shows, corporate events, and private performances. In 2023, I brought that same energy to Ottawa — training 200+ students, choreographing 50+ performances, and proudly opening our own dance studio on 5th March 2026. 💃

My classes are known for high energy, detailed technique, crazy entertainment, and nonstop laughter — where students learn hard, dance harder, and leave with a smile every single time. 😄🔥 Now Ottawa… it's your turn. Let's dance, perform, celebrate, and ROCK THE SHOW together! 🥳

🎬 Bollywood  ·  🎶 Folk  ·  🏛️ Classical  ·  🕺 Commercial  ·  🌍 International
